composer.bodyPlaceholder: Keep it kind, specific, and useful for the next viewer.
composer.hint: Comments are posted to the Community API and update the video count.

home.subtitle: A light, cute video community for creators, ready to switch from Nuxt mock data to the backend community API.
home.dynamicsDescription: Creator updates and lightweight site notes from the backend timeline, tuned for a breezy kirakira reading rhythm.

category.childrenDescription: Browse a narrower branch. Parent categories aggregate everything below them.

following.title: Following
following.description: Anonymous clientId follows are written to the community backend, then used to show subscribed creators and new uploads.
following.errorDescription: The community API did not return following data.
following.emptyDescription: Follow a creator and this page will load your subscriptions from the backend relationship table.
following.followedDescription: These relationships come from the Go community API anonymous follow table.
following.recommendedDescription: When you have no follows yet, the community API shows recommended creators first.
following.noContentDescription: No following feed data was returned.
following.dynamicComposerDescription: Write to the community timeline with this browser anonymous clientId; creator identity can replace it later.
following.dynamicsDescription: Recent updates from followed creators appear here first.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Messages generated by your anonymous community actions, including comments, danmaku, follows, saves, and reports.
notifications.errorDescription: The community API did not return notification data.
notifications.defaultMessage: Notifications use the anonymous clientId in this browser.
notifications.listDescription: Recent receipts and community state changes from the backend notification table.
notifications.emptyDescription: Comment, send danmaku, follow a creator, save a video, or submit a report to create a message here.

docs.title: Project System and Component Library
docs.description: Static Markdown documentation for the Nuxt architecture, repository boundaries, and every Aoi wrapper API.

notFound.title: Document not found
notFound.description: This page does not exist in the current documentation set.

shell.title: Settings
shell.description: Adjust Aoi appearance, preferences, local data, and diagnostics.

appearance.title: Reset Appearance Settings
appearance.description: Restore appearance, palette, background parameters, and size units from the current active build configuration. The browser-saved background image will be cleared.

preference.title: Reset Preference Settings
preference.description: Restore data mode, browsing, route progress, reveal motion, scrolling, privacy, and focus settings from the current active build configuration.

language.title: Reset Language Settings
language.description: Restore the interface language from the current active build configuration and apply it immediately.

derivation.presetDescription: Use soft, balanced, or vivid to sync every derivation group. Manually tuning any group switches to custom.
derivation.themeDescription: Controls how strongly the accent derives auxiliary colors, surfaces, states, navigation, Material controls, and shadows.
derivation.specDescription: Controls how type, spacing, radius, controls, content width, media grids, and settings layout derive from the base units.

soft.label: Soft
soft.description: More restrained and gentle, with softer color, layout, and motion.

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.description: Default strength for the existing Aoi visual and interaction rhythm.

vivid.label: Vivid
vivid.description: Brighter and more layered, with stronger color, spec, and motion feedback.

custom.label: Custom
custom.description: Keeps the manually tuned strength for each derivation group.

auxiliaryPalette.title: Auxiliary palette
auxiliaryPalette.label: Auxiliary color strength
auxiliaryPalette.description: Affects secondary, sakura, sun, and other accent-derived auxiliary colors.

surfaceTint.title: Surface tint
surfaceTint.label: Surface tint strength
surfaceTint.description: Affects how much accent color enters page backgrounds, cards, borders, and text layers.

stateLayer.title: State layer
stateLayer.label: State layer strength
stateLayer.description: Affects hover, pressed, selected, and focus state colors and opacity.

navigationColor.title: Navigation tint
navigationColor.label: Navigation color strength
navigationColor.description: Affects accent response in the rail, mobile navigation, and selected item backgrounds.

materialColor.title: Material controls
materialColor.label: Material color strength
materialColor.description: Affects Material Web primary, secondary, surface, and related tokens.

shadowDepth.title: Shadow depth
shadowDepth.label: Shadow strength
shadowDepth.description: Affects shadow opacity and perceived elevation depth.

typography.title: Typography scale
typography.label: Typography derivation strength
typography.description: Affects how strongly headings, body text, and small text expand or contract from the base font size.

spacing.title: Spacing rhythm
spacing.label: Spacing derivation strength
spacing.description: Affects page padding, grid gaps, and compact gaps derived from the base spacing unit.

radius.title: Radius layers
radius.label: Radius derivation strength
radius.description: Affects the difference between card, panel, control, and choice corner radii.

controls.title: Control spec
controls.label: Control derivation strength
controls.description: Affects buttons, fields, icon buttons, and navigation action sizes.

contentWidth.title: Content width
contentWidth.label: Content width strength
contentWidth.description: Affects how normal and wide content containers expand or contract from the base width.

mediaGrid.title: Media grid
mediaGrid.label: Media grid strength
mediaGrid.description: Affects video card column width and media list density.

settingsLayout.title: Settings layout
settingsLayout.label: Settings layout strength
settingsLayout.description: Affects settings card and control column width rhythm.

revealMotion.title: Reveal motion
revealMotion.label: Reveal motion strength
revealMotion.description: Affects reveal animation distance, duration, stagger, and maximum delay.

routeProgress.title: Route progress
routeProgress.label: Route progress strength
routeProgress.description: Affects the top progress bar height, initial value, speed, and trickle rhythm.

scrollSnap.title: Scroll snap
scrollSnap.label: Scroll snap strength
scrollSnap.description: Affects how strongly scroll scenes snap to anchors.

scrollHijack.title: Scroll takeover
scrollHijack.label: Scroll takeover strength
scrollHijack.description: Affects the wheel-input threshold for scroll scene takeover.

rubberBand.title: Rubber band
rubberBand.label: Rubber band strength
rubberBand.description: Affects boundary bounce distance and damping feel.

danmaku.title: Danmaku visual and motion
danmaku.label: Danmaku derivation strength
danmaku.description: Affects danmaku font size, opacity, speed, and visible area.

form.title: Form
form.description: Tune density, size, corners, contrast, and navigation emphasis across Aoi.
form.densityDescription: Controls page spacing and settings row rhythm.
form.sizeDescription: Adjusts base type, control height, and navigation icon scale.
form.shapeDescription: Layers corner radius across controls, choices, and content surfaces.
form.contrastDescription: Raises legibility for text, borders, and selected states.
form.colorfulNavDescription: Lightly tints side and mobile navigation with the current accent color.

specUnits.title: Primary size units
specUnits.description: Manage the source dimensions used to derive spacing, controls, navigation, grids, and rounded corners.

baseFont.title: Base type
baseFont.description: Feeds body text and heading scale.
baseFont.label: Base font size

space.title: Spacing unit
space.description: Feeds page padding, panel rhythm, and compact gaps.
space.label: Base spacing

radius.title: Corner unit
radius.description: Feeds surface, card, control, and choice radii.
radius.label: Base corner radius

controlHeight.title: Control height
controlHeight.description: Feeds buttons, fields, icon buttons, and navigation actions.
controlHeight.label: Base control height

contentMaxWidth.title: Content width
contentMaxWidth.description: Sets normal page width with either a fluid percentage or a fixed pixel cap.
contentMaxWidth.label: Content width

contentWideMaxWidth.title: Wide content width
contentWideMaxWidth.description: Sets settings and workspace page width with either a fluid percentage or a fixed pixel cap.
contentWideMaxWidth.label: Wide content width

railWidth.title: Desktop rail
railWidth.description: Sets the fixed side navigation width.
railWidth.label: Desktop rail width

mobileNavHeight.title: Mobile navigation
mobileNavHeight.description: Sets mobile header, bottom navigation, and safe page padding.
mobileNavHeight.label: Mobile nav height

videoGridMinCardWidth.title: Video grid card
videoGridMinCardWidth.description: Sets the minimum card column width on desktop grids.
videoGridMinCardWidth.label: Video card min width

settingsCardMinWidth.title: Settings card
settingsCardMinWidth.description: Sets the minimum settings card and control column width.
settingsCardMinWidth.label: Settings card min width

palette.title: Accent color
palette.description: Choose a preset palette or switch to a custom color.

persona.backgroundDescription: The background image is stored only in this browser and is not uploaded.

derivation.title: Derived strength
derivation.description: Tune how soft or vivid each light accent token feels.
derivation.toneDescription: Current {value}%. Lower is softer, higher is more vivid.

accent10.title: Accent 10
accent10.label: Accent 10 strength
accent10.affected: May affect: soft state backgrounds, active navigation backgrounds, tag/notice/empty-state surfaces, Material primary containers, and progress tracks.

accent20.title: Accent 20
accent20.label: Accent 20 strength
accent20.affected: May affect: custom palette slider tracks, Material secondary containers, and light gradients on About and Experimental pages.

accent40.title: Accent 40
accent40.label: Accent 40 strength
accent40.affected: May affect: dark-mode active color, dark focus/hover/pressed/border states, dark navigation selection, and card/upload/skeleton accents.

accent50.title: Accent 50
accent50.label: Accent 50 strength
accent50.affected: May affect: active progress color, page-edge hint gradients, brand/auth/profile decorative gradients, rich-text quote borders, and skeleton accents.

cards.emptyAssets: No selectable images in this folder.
cards.confirmDescription: This writes the current active build profile, only updating accent card assets and leaving the original backup unchanged.
cards.saved: Accent card config was written to the current active build profile.

errors.loadAssets: Could not read public assets. Try again later.
errors.profile: Could not read build profiles, so the card config cannot be written.
errors.save: Could not write the build profile. Check that developer mode is still available.
errors.upload: Image upload failed. Try another image or retry later.

routeProgress.title: Route progress bar
routeProgress.description: Use NProgress for route navigation feedback while keeping Nuxt's built-in loading lifecycle.
routeProgress.enabledDescription: Show a slim loading bar during page navigation.
routeProgress.trickleDescription: Let NProgress slowly advance while the next page is still loading.
routeProgress.spinnerDescription: Display the optional NProgress spinner in the top-right corner.
routeProgress.easingDescription: Choose the transition curve used by the progress bar.

reveal.title: Reveal motion
reveal.description: Tune how content panels, cards, and lists pop into view while browsing.
reveal.enabledDescription: Turn off to keep reveal-enabled content immediately visible.
reveal.effectDescription: Choose whether each module keeps its local effect or uses one global style.
reveal.replayDescription: Control whether reveal motion repeats when content re-enters the viewport.

scroll.title: Scroll experience
scroll.description: Control global smooth scrolling, magnetic snapping, opt-in scroll scenes, and edge damping.

scrollbar.strategyDescription: Choose whether the page reserves scrollbar space to prevent Windows-style layout shifts.

smooth.enabledDescription: Use Lenis to soften wheel-driven page scrolling while preserving native touch inertia.

snap.enabledDescription: Allow Aoi scroll areas and scenes to settle on nearby items or sections.
snap.modeDescription: Choose a softer proximity snap or a stricter mandatory snap.

hijack.enabledDescription: Let explicit Aoi scroll scenes capture large wheel or keyboard steps and jump section by section.
hijack.modeDescription: Choose whether a scene follows its current section or recalculates the nearest section before moving.

rubberBand.enabledDescription: Show a small rubber-band response at page and scroll-area edges.

developerUnlock.hint: Click the Aoi mark 4 times to enable Developer Mode.
developerUnlock.remaining: {count} more clicks to enter Developer Mode.
developerUnlock.enabled: Developer Mode is enabled. The Developer page is now available in Settings.
developerUnlock.logoLabel: Aoi product mark, click four times to enable Developer Mode

developer.title: Developer
developer.description: Generate build-time default app settings and write the controlled source config in local development.

locked.title: Developer Mode is locked
locked.description: Open the About page and use the hidden Aoi mark interaction to enable Developer Mode.

status.title: Build defaults
status.description: This page only writes the active default config. The original backup config is never modified.

generated.title: Generated preview
generated.description: Generate TypeScript config from the current app settings. Developer Mode, background files, and local content data are excluded.

source.title: Source config actions
source.description: Write overwrites the active default config. Restore regenerates it from the original backup.
source.devNote: The write API is available only on the local dev server and accepts only a fixed allowlist settings object.
source.productionNote: This is not the local dev server, so source writes and restores are disabled.

messages.refreshed: Preview regenerated from the current app settings.
messages.restored: Active defaults were restored from the original backup.

errors.copy: Copy failed. Select the preview text directly instead.
errors.write: Write failed. Make sure this is the local dev server.
errors.restore: Restore failed. Make sure this is the local dev server.

profiles.confirmBeforeApply: Profile writes and applies must show a diff preview and confirmation.
profiles.buildDescription: Build presets use one JSON file per profile and keep a matching original backup.
profiles.runtimeDescription: Runtime profiles are stored only in the current browser and can be imported or exported.
profiles.backgroundReferenceNote: Background profiles save references only, never image bytes.

assets.title: Public Assets
assets.description: Manage build-bound files in public, app/assets, and i18n/locales from the local dev server.

unavailable.title: Public asset management is available only in local dev
unavailable.description: Production builds and preview do not expose source-file write APIs. Use this panel under pnpm dev.

assets.empty: No assets are available in this directory.
assets.emptySearch: No assets match the current search.
assets.previewUnavailable: This file type cannot be previewed inline. Download or replace it instead.
assets.previewDirectory: Double-click a directory to open it. File previews appear here.

dialogs.createFileDescription: Create an empty text file in the current directory.
dialogs.createDirectoryDescription: Create a folder in the current directory.
dialogs.copyDescription: Copy {name} to a relative target path. If the target is a directory, the original name is kept.
dialogs.moveDescription: Move {name} to a relative target path. This changes the source directory structure.
dialogs.chmodDescription: Set a 3- or 4-digit octal mode for {name}, such as 644, 755, or 7777.
dialogs.deleteDescription: Delete {name}. Directories are deleted recursively and are not moved to trash.
dialogs.uploadOverwriteDescription: One or more uploaded files already exist in the target directory. Confirm to overwrite them.

editor.title: Text editor
editor.unavailable: Only text assets up to 1 MiB can be edited inline.

errors.copyUrl: Could not copy the public URL.

components.title: Components
components.description: A developer-mode lab for Aoi components, business components, and local interaction states.
components.catalogDescription: Component lab, control states, and business component examples.
components.loadingDescription: The component lab will continue once local settings have been restored.
components.keywords: components showcase developer aoi controls lab demo

experimental.title: Experiments
experimental.description: Try reusable interface patterns before they move into product flows.

lightbox.title: Lightbox gallery
lightbox.description: Preview the reusable Aoi lightbox with images, video controls, thumbnails, keyboard navigation, and touch gestures.

sunflower.title: Sunflower interface study
sunflower.description: A warm image placeholder for checking zoom, pan, captions, and thumbnail focus.

sakura.title: Sakura accent frame
sakura.description: A softer image item for testing color balance inside the dark lightbox surface.

video.title: Local video preview
video.description: The bundled sample video exercises custom playback, seek, volume, mute, and fullscreen controls.

night.title: Night mode contrast
night.description: A darker image placeholder for checking caption contrast and reduced-motion behavior.

scrollDemo.title: Scroll system demo
scrollDemo.description: A compact scene for checking smooth scrolling, magnetic snapping, scroll hijacking, and edge damping together.

smooth.title: Inertial page motion
smooth.description: Wheel input eases into place through the global Lenis runtime when smooth scrolling is enabled.

snap.title: Magnetic sections
snap.description: Each panel is a snap target, so the scene can settle on the nearest useful reading position.

hijack.title: Opt-in scene control
hijack.description: When scene hijacking is enabled, large wheel and keyboard steps move one panel at a time.

richText.title: Rich text editor
richText.description: Draft Markdown-first rich content while preserving the full Tiptap document as a fallback contract.
richText.placeholder: Write a creator note, release plan, or formatted description...
richText.supportingText: Markdown is the primary text output; JSON preserves styles Markdown cannot express.
richText.sample:
# Aoi rich text draft

Use **Markdown** shortcuts or the toolbar to shape content.

- Keep the Markdown output readable
- Preserve colors, tables, alignment, and other rich details in JSON
- Reject unsafe links and image URLs

> This panel is an isolated experiment and does not change upload drafts or comments yet.

player.subtitle: Subtitles
player.loadInterruptedDescription: The video payload could not be loaded.
player.reportDetailPlaceholder: For example: where the issue appears, why it matters, or what reviewers should check
player.reportDialogDescription: This report is submitted to the Community API and stored in the backend report table as pending. Please be specific and avoid duplicate reports.
player.reportSubmitError: Report submission failed. Check that the Community API is available and retry.
player.communityCommentComposerHint: Comments post to the Community API. Keep them kind, specific, and discussable.
player.communityCommentSubmitError: Comment submission failed. Check that the Community API is available and retry.
player.communityCommentEmptyDescription: Start the discussion. It will be saved to the backend community comments table.
player.danmakuPlaceholder: Send a friendly danmaku for this moment

errors.dash: The DASH stream failed to load.
errors.hls: The HLS stream failed to load.
errors.noSource: No playable video source is available.
errors.unsupportedFormat: This video format is not supported by the current browser.
errors.unsupportedHls: HLS playback is not supported by the current browser.

dynamics.emptyDescription: Post a pulse or follow creators to fill the timeline.

composer.bodyPlaceholder: Share a creative note, site discovery, or lightweight update.
composer.hint: Pulses are posted to the Community API and refresh this timeline.

upload.title: Upload workspace
upload.description: Prepare video details and submit them to the community review queue.

empty.title: No upload draft yet
empty.description: Create a draft to prepare title, category, tags, and visibility.

source.title: Video source
source.emptyDescription: Only the name, size, and MIME type are read here; file bytes stay in the browser.

fields.title: Title
fields.author: Display name
fields.authorHelp: Used for the review record and receipt notification
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the video, its hook, and who it is for

validation.descriptionHelpful: Add a 20+ character description for future search and recommendations

review.title: Publish check
review.emptyDescription: The description appears here so you can check the first impression.

submission.error: Submission failed. Check that the Community API is available and retry.

submissions.title: Recent submissions
submissions.empty: No submissions from this browser yet.
